# JSON Formatter
> Free online JSON formatter, validator, minifier, and converter for developers.

JSON Formatter is a browser-based developer tool available at https://json.toolzy.site.
No installation or login required. All processing happens in the browser.

## Features
- **Format / Beautify**: Paste raw JSON and instantly format it with 2-space, 4-space, or tab indentation.
- **Validate**: Real-time JSON validation with inline error messages.
- **Minify**: Compress JSON by removing whitespace.
- **Sort Keys**: Alphabetically sort all keys in a JSON object recursively.
- **JSON to CSV**: Convert a JSON array of objects to CSV. Nested objects are flattened using dot-notation (e.g. role.admin).
- **JSON to TypeScript**: Auto-generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON. Nested objects become separate interfaces.
- **Tree View**: Explore JSON in an interactive collapsible tree. Supports Expand All / Collapse All.
- **JSON Path Copy**: Hover any node in Tree View to copy its JSON path (e.g. $.address.city).
- **Search**: Press Ctrl+F to search keys or values. Highlights matches in Formatted and Tree views. Shows a result panel with all matches.
- **Escape / Unescape**: Escape JSON to a string literal or unescape a JSON string back to structured JSON.
- **File Upload**: Upload a .json file directly into the editor.
- **Download**: Download formatted output as .json, .csv, or .ts file.
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Shift+Alt+F (Format), Ctrl+Shift+M (Minify), Ctrl+Shift+S (Download), Ctrl+F (Search).

## Use Cases
- Developers debugging API responses
- Converting JSON data exports to CSV for spreadsheets
- Generating TypeScript types from API response shapes
- Exploring deeply nested JSON structures visually

## URL
https://json.toolzy.site
